candidates.title: High-Energy Club Recap Videos
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I'm seeking a talented video editor to create high-energy, 30-second recaps of club nights. These videos will be used to promote future events and need to capture the vibrant atmosphere of our nights. Requirements: - 30-second videos - Recaps of club nights - Energetic and fast-paced vibe Ideal Skills and Experience: - Proficiency in video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro) - Experience with music and event highlight reels - Ability to create engaging, dynamic content - Strong portfolio showcasing past work Please include relevant past work in your application.

candidates.title: Creative Video Editor Needed for Sports Day Highlight Reel (Instagram & Social Media) – Urgent
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price We are looking for a talented and creative video editor to create an exciting, high-energy highlight video for our recent Sports Day event. We already have all the raw footage, including videos and photographs. We need someone who can transform the content into a professional, engaging, and emotionally impactful highlight reel suitable for Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook, and other social media platforms. What We Need * Create a visually stunning Sports Day highlight video * Use cinematic transitions, motion effects, and creative storytelling * Select and synchronize engaging background music with the action * Include key moments, celebrations, team spirit, awards, and memorable highlights * Add text overlays, titles, and event branding where appropriate * Create an Instagram-friendly version (Reel/Vertical Format) * Optional: Create a longer highlight version (2–4 min

candidates.title: 360° VR Hawai'i Wedding Video Editing
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I have an entire beach & mountains wedding day captured in stitched-ready 360° footage and now need it shaped into a romantic, emotionally-driven story that guests can relive inside a headset or on a phone. The idea is to open with a concise highlight reel that flows gracefully through the day, then let viewers dive into separate, fully-edited clips for every key moment. Collaboration is important to me, I value clear communication & hope my feedback will be welcome at every stage. Here’s what I will hand over: * Raw 360° files covering a pre-ceremony women’s blessing circle, arch creation (& removal), the full ceremony, the welcoming-with-bubbles to the reception, reception highlights, & including full video of each singer and speaker. * Ambient audio tracks and the RAV pan drum music we want woven underneath … What I need back: * A polished highlight reel (6–8 min range) paced for emot

candidates.title: Modern Wedding Video Invitation
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro · Animate — for layered/retouched assets and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I’m putting together a sleek, contemporary video invitation for my upcoming wedding and need a creative editor / motion-designer to bring it to life. The finished piece should feel fresh and modern rather than traditional or overtly romantic, so think clean typography, subtle transitions, and upbeat pacing that will look great when shared on WhatsApp, Instagram, and email. You’ll receive all the key details—names, date, venue, schedule, and any photos or short clips we’d like worked in—as soon as we kick off. I don’t have a fixed colour palette or thematic motif, so you’re free to propose a look that fits the modern brief while complementing our footage and the overall vibe of the event. Please include a quick note about your experience producing wedding or event video invites (links are ideal) so I can gauge style compatibility.
